name: START
audience: Early-stage entrepreneurs and people in employment

blocks.title: Education
items: Preferential access to Netology courses
Accelerator for early-stage entrepreneurs
Accelerator for employed professionals
10% off UNION educational products

blocks.title: Consulting
items: Annual personal diagnostic — personality audit
1 group consulting session per month with UNION experts
2 group sessions per year led by BUSINESS residents

blocks.title: Networking
items: Monthly forum with speakers
Monthly MasterMind / Codevelopment
Annual networking with BUSINESS residents
Annual all-UNION residents meetup

blocks.title: Support
items: Group community manager

name: BUSINESS
audience: Entrepreneurs with revenue of 100–500M ₽ per year
note: + full access to START package options

blocks.title: Education
items: Preferential Netology access for the resident and employees
Monthly accelerator seat for 1 employee
Access to monthly offline seminars (50+ lessons)
2 seminar seats for employees once per year
15% off UNION educational products

blocks.title: Consulting
items: Annual diagnostic with expert debrief
1 personal 2-hour consulting session per month
2 group sessions per year led by PREMIER residents
Personal Board of Directors twice a year
Course “Company life cycle management”

blocks.title: Networking
items: Monthly forum and MasterMind with BUSINESS residents
Business visits to fellow club members
2 annual networking events with PREMIER residents
Host your own event at UNION twice a year

blocks.title: Support
items: Dedicated community manager

name: PREMIER
audience: Entrepreneurs with revenue from 500M ₽ per year
note: + full access to START and BUSINESS package options

blocks.title: Education
items: Preferential Netology access for the resident and employees
Monthly accelerator access for 2 employees (for people in employment)
Unlimited offline seminars for the resident (50+ lessons from experts)
4 offline seminar seats for the resident’s employees once per year (50+ lessons)
20% off UNION educational products

blocks.title: Consulting
items: Annual personal diagnostic — personality audit: test debrief and IDP with a UNION expert
2 personal 2-hour sessions per month (case work + tracking) for the resident or employees
2-day strategic session with a UNION expert once per year
Personal Board of Directors twice a year (forum of 5–7 peers at a similar level and values)
Course “Company life cycle management”

blocks.title: Networking
items: Monthly forum with speakers — private dinner with a speaker
Monthly MasterMind / Codevelopment with PREMIER residents and club experts
Business visits to major companies in Russia and worldwide
Union Council membership (agenda influence)
Annual all-UNION residents meetup
Host your own event at UNION four times a year

blocks.title: Support
items: Dedicated community manager
